subcodes.first_line: O friends of the Most Glorious Beauty! The horizon of all regions is luminous with the light of the Covenant, and the realm of existence hath been transformed into a rose garden of the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان جمال ابهی افق آفاق بنور میثاق روشن است و ساحت وجود بحدائق ملکوت گلشن
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
